title: Evidence Status
description: Optional per-pair honesty label at `results/{pair_id}/evidence_status.json`. It tells dashboard consumers whether the currently displayed winner is merely the best rule found in a broad search, still needs a fresh confirmation test, or has passed that confirmation. Missing files default to `found_in_search` in the app.

status.description: `found_in_search` means the winner is the best rule selected from the tournament search. `needs_final_exam` means confirmation is planned or partially prepared but not yet passed. `passed_final_exam` means a fresh holdout or equivalent confirmation test was run after selection and passed.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for the evidence-status decision.

confirmation_test.description: Name of the final-exam/confirmation method, when applicable.

plain_english.description: Optional pair-specific plain-English wording. If omitted, the app uses canonical ELI5 copy for the status enum.

technical_note.description: Optional technical note documenting the statistical reason for the status.

next_step.description: Optional next action, especially for `found_in_search` or `needs_final_exam`.

owner.description: Agent or human who made the evidence-status decision.
